title: Normalization and Denormalization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the fundamental trade-offs between normalization and denormalization.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of database normalization?
options: To increase the amount of redundant data
To minimize redundancy and improve data integrity
To speed up read operations for reporting

questions.question: Which of these is a key characteristic of Denormalization?
options: Intentionally adding redundant data to improve read performance
Ensuring that every table has only one column
Moving data to a different database server

questions.question: Which database normal form involves eliminating transitive dependencies?
In which type of database architecture is denormalization most common?
What is one major drawback of denormalization?
options: Requirement to manually manage consistency across duplicated data
